classes.purpose: Compare retailer signals with current retailer presence and the brand-owned catalogue
classes.content: Completed Retailer Signals report and verdict; retailer, category and brand names; current database snapshot, retailer-presence rows, owned-catalogue rows, accepted mappings, product attributes, candidate products, image URLs and locally hydrated images

classes.purpose: Interpret gaps and candidates and create and independently check the local report
classes.content: Scope metrics, deterministic claims, report model, selected products, rationales, caveats, semantic review, browser QA, correctness findings, and final HTML

boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Build and return a Brand Fit evidence package from the actor-owned retail evidence job and central database snapshot
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: Source evidence-job identifier, retailer-report SHA-256 and exact verdict, brand name and brand-source retailer, optional category aliases, and authentication metadata; the local Retailer Signals HTML report is not uploaded
controls: The user explicitly selects Brand Fit and the authenticated job derives source identifiers and hashes from an intact local Retailer Signals run.
The separate hosted-service record states the source-backed access and retention position.

boundaries_beyond_codex.destination: Public product-image hosts named by the evidence package
boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Download retailer and owned-catalogue product images for local evidence and report review
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: Package-supplied public image URLs and ordinary network request metadata; image bytes remain local
controls: The image hydrator validates public address, redirect, byte-size, and hash constraints.
Retailer and owned-catalogue image scopes remain separated.

security_controls.control: Only the source report hash, verdict, and actor-owned evidence-job identifier cross the hosted boundary; the report file itself remains local.
Authentication cookies are kept outside the run folder and attached only to the exact approved Mparanza origin.
